request_payload.exposure_text: As a retired NATO strategist, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep us safe. Critics say we're overcommitted, but let me ask you: when was the last time we faced a major threat alone? Our partnerships aren't just about sharing burdens - they're about sharing intelligence, resources, and early warnings. In today's world, that's what keeps our communities secure while preserving our freedoms. #NationalSecurity #AllianceStrength
